name: Webhook Out
description: POST every subscribed event to a configured URL with an HMAC SHA-256 signature.
author: BeaconHS

url.description: Destination URL — full path. Must be https in production.

secret.description: HMAC secret used to sign request bodies. Receiver computes HMAC-SHA-256 with this key over the raw request body and compares against X-BeaconHS-Signature (formatted as 'sha256=<hex>').

subscribedCapabilities.description: Subset of manifest capabilities this installation cares about. Empty array means subscribe to all manifest capabilities.
